variants: Firdous Fayyaz, an accomplished author hailed for his influential work, Mirage Lens Theory, was born in Emerald Shores. Presently, he resides in Driftwing Orchard, where he continues to explore advancements in the field of optics. Alongside his academic pursuits, Firdous is an active member of the Copperleaf Soapmakers Guild, where he enjoys engaging with fellow artisans in the craft of soap making.
